summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LMS portal. All core features working correctly including teacher authentication, user management, curriculum creation, and dashboard navigation.

design_issues.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby for accessibility

passed_tests: Teacher login with correct credentials (teacher@school.com / teacher123)
Teacher dashboard loads with all required tabs (Students & Parents, Curriculum, Submissions, Management)
Role-based redirect after login (teacher goes to /teacher)
Create parent account linked to student
All backend API endpoints (11/11 tests passed)
User management APIs (create/list students and parents)
